c74object.name: dk.quantussy~
c74object.description: The dk.quantussy~ object is a digital recreation of the ciat-lonbarde Quantussy modulation matrix. "The Quantussy is a five petaled flower, each petal with oscirator, that creates a rhythm, that triggers quantizations of the movements of the other four oscirators". It is essentially a set of cross-modulating oscillators that function as chaotic control voltage outputs or as oscillators.
c74object.discussion: Based on the ciat-lonbarde Cocoquantus' Quantussy. For more information visit https://ciat-lonbarde.net/ciat-lonbarde/cocoquantus/index.html

inlet.digest: Note input and optional audio input
inlet.description: Note input (as MIDI float) and optional audio input for triggering the algorithm.

outlet.description: Impulse that is fed to algorithm output.

outlet.digest: Dump out for parameter names, ranges, and values
outlet.description: Dump out for parameter names, ranges, and values.

method.name: dump
method.digest: Dump parameter names, ranges, and values
method.description: Dumps parameter names, ranges, and values out of the right-most outlet.

method.name: randomize
method.description: Randomize parameters defined by the preset dictionary. An additional optional argument will randomize by a certain percentage.

attribute.name: chaos
attribute.digest: Modulation depth for all cross modulations
attribute.description: Modulation depth for all cross modulations (-1 to 1).

attribute.name: curve
attribute.digest: Shape of slopes as they rise and fall
attribute.description: Effects the shape of slopes as they rise and fall without affecting the durations of either stage (-1 to 1).

attribute.name: frequency
attribute.digest: Overall clock frequency of all oscillators
attribute.description: Overall clock frequency of all oscillators (-1 to 1).

attribute.name: ramp
attribute.digest: Controls the balance of rise-time to fall-time
attribute.description: Controls the balance of rise-time to fall-time as proportions of the total slope duration (-1 to 1).

attribute.name: ramptime
attribute.digest: Ramp time for smoothing of each parameter
attribute.description: Ramp time for smoothing each parameter (in ms).

attribute.name: ratea
attribute.description: Rate of oscillator A, ranging from sub-LFO to audio rate (-1 to 1).

attribute.name: rateb
attribute.description: Rate of oscillator B, ranging from sub-LFO to audio rate (-1 to 1).

attribute.name: ratec
attribute.description: Rate of oscillator C, ranging from sub-LFO to audio rate (-1 to 1).

attribute.name: rated
attribute.description: Rate of oscillator D, ranging from sub-LFO to audio rate (-1 to 1).

attribute.name: ratee
attribute.description: Rate of oscillator E, ranging from sub-LFO to audio rate (-1 to 1).

attribute.name: upsample
attribute.description: How much upsampling to apply to underlying algorithm (0 = none, 1 = default, 2 = maximum).
